question.label: Specific feedback
question.name: Specific feedback — where does it usually get too vague or too late?
question.description: Drills into the feedback thread to locate the point where support stops being useful.

answer: Some days I feel useful, other days I feel like I am guessing.

assessment.note: He describes oscillating between feeling useful and guessing, which signals inconsistent clarity and a mild lack of growth-support through usable feedback.

new_queue.label: Feeling useful
new_queue.name: When do you feel useful versus like you're guessing?

new_queue.label: Energy read
new_queue.name: How's your energy been lately — separately from how work is going?

new_queue.label: Support next step
new_queue.name: What would help most from me right now?

issues: coverage: injected growth into next question (0 touches after turn 5)

history.answer_excerpt: The hardest part is changing direction late and feeling like I missed something.
I feel better when feedback is specific and close to the work.

I am still unsure what good really looks like here week to week.
